subject: A single costumed figure wearing a full-face mask with a colorful swirl pattern — a fighter dressed as 'Mighty Mask' — standing upright against a teal and green energy background.
suspected_ip: Mighty Mask (Trunks + Goten in disguise) — Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super
description: A single fighter in a disguise costume fills the mid-shot frame. The defining visual feature is a full-face mask with a colorful swirling pattern — circular, multi-colored design on the face that obscures identity entirely. The figure wears a martial arts tournament outfit appropriate to the setting. The background is teal and green with energy swirls. The mask's design reads as slightly comic, given that the costume is meant to be a disguise for two small fighters stacked. The pose is upright and composed.
foreground: Masked fighter in tournament costume with swirl-patterned full-face mask
emotion: Neutral / comedic — mask conceals expression entirely, creating inherent comedy of the disguise
